disclosures.name: General Requirements
disclosures.description: Sets out the general architecture and principles for preparing sustainability statements under CSRD. Covers double materiality, due diligence, value chain, time horizons, and preparation/presentation of sustainability information.
disclosures.guidanceText: ESRS 1 prescribes the mandatory principles to comply with when preparing sustainability statements. It covers reporting areas including governance, strategy, impact/risk/opportunity management, and metrics/targets.

disclosures.name: General basis for preparation of the sustainability statement
disclosures.description: Disclose the general basis for preparation of the sustainability statement, including scope of consolidation, value chain estimation, and changes from previous periods.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose basis for preparation including reporting entity scope, whether it differs from financial statements, and any value chain estimation approaches used.

disclosures.name: Disclosures in relation to specific circumstances
disclosures.description: Address specific circumstances such as time horizon estimation, reporting errors, and assurance approaches.
disclosures.guidanceText: Cover estimation and outcome uncertainty, classification changes, reporting errors, and information about assurance of the sustainability statement.

disclosures.name: The role of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
disclosures.description: Disclose the composition and diversity of governance bodies, their roles in sustainability matters, and access to expertise.

requiredMetrics.name: Governance body members with sustainability expertise
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of governance body members with ESG competence

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the composition of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, their roles and responsibilities regarding sustainability matters, and their access to expertise and skills.

disclosures.name: Information provided to and sustainability matters addressed by the undertaking's administrative, management and supervisory bodies
disclosures.description: Disclose how governance bodies are informed about sustainability matters and how they address them.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about sustainability matters and how these matters were addressed during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Integration of sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes
disclosures.description: Disclose how sustainability-related performance is integrated into incentive schemes for governance bodies and senior management.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are considered as performance benchmarks or included in remuneration policies.

disclosures.name: Statement on due diligence
disclosures.description: Disclose a mapping of the information provided in its sustainability statement about the due diligence process.
disclosures.guidanceText: Provide a mapping of the information about the due diligence process as described in the sustainability statement.

disclosures.name: Risk management and internal controls over sustainability reporting
disclosures.description: Disclose the main features of the undertaking's risk management and internal control system in relation to the sustainability reporting process.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the main features of the risk management and internal control system in relation to the sustainability reporting process.

disclosures.name: Strategy, business model and value chain
disclosures.description: Provide an understanding of the undertaking's strategy, business model and value chain, including key products/services, markets, and stakeholder relationships.

requiredMetrics.name: Revenue by significant ESRS sector
requiredMetrics.description: Net revenue breakdown by significant ESRS sector

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose description of significant groups of products/services, significant markets/customer groups, and a description of the key features of the undertaking's upstream and downstream value chain.

disclosures.name: Interests and views of stakeholders
disclosures.description: Disclose how stakeholders' interests and views are taken into account by the undertaking's strategy and business model.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose how the undertaking's strategy and business model take account of the interests and views of its stakeholders.

disclosures.name: Material impacts, risks and opportunities and their interaction with strategy and business model
disclosures.description: Disclose the material impacts, risks and opportunities and how they interact with the undertaking's strategy and business model.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the material impacts, risks and opportunities and how they interact with the strategy and business model, including current and anticipated financial effects.

disclosures.name: Description of the processes to identify and assess material impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Describe the process used to identify and assess material sustainability-related impacts, risks and opportunities (double materiality assessment).
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the methodologies and assumptions applied in the process to identify material impacts, risks and opportunities. Cover both impact materiality and financial materiality.

disclosures.name: Disclosure requirements in ESRS covered by the undertaking's sustainability statement
disclosures.description: Provide a list of the disclosure requirements in ESRS that are being reported on, those omitted with justification, and phase-in provisions applied.
disclosures.guidanceText: Provide a list of ESRS disclosure requirements covered, disclosure requirements not material with brief explanation, and any phase-in provisions applied.

disclosures.name: Transition plan for climate change mitigation
disclosures.description: Disclose the transition plan for climate change mitigation, including GHG reduction targets aligned with Paris Agreement.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the transition plan for climate change mitigation. The plan shall explain how GHG emission reduction targets are compatible with limiting global warming to 1.5C.

disclosures.name: Policies related to climate change mitigation and adaptation
disclosures.description: Describe policies adopted to manage material impacts, risks and opportunities related to climate change mitigation and adaptation.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe policies adopted to manage material climate change impacts, risks and opportunities, including engagement with value chain.

disclosures.name: Actions and resources in relation to climate change policies
disclosures.description: Describe key actions taken and planned to prevent, mitigate or remediate actual impacts, and manage risks and opportunities related to climate change.

requiredMetrics.name: CapEx for climate actions
requiredMetrics.description: Capital expenditure for climate change mitigation and adaptation actions

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose key actions and resources related to climate change policies, including decarbonization levers and expected GHG emission reductions.

disclosures.name: Targets related to climate change mitigation and adaptation
disclosures.description: Disclose the climate-related targets adopted, including GHG emission reduction targets.

requiredMetrics.name: Base year for target
requiredMetrics.description: Base year used for GHG reduction target

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose climate-related targets, including whether they are absolute or intensity-based, the base year and target year, and progress to date.

disclosures.name: Energy consumption and mix
disclosures.description: Disclose energy consumption and energy mix, including the share from renewable and non-renewable sources.

requiredMetrics.name: Total energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumption from fossil and non-fossil sources

requiredMetrics.name: Share of renewable energy
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of energy from renewable sources

requiredMetrics.name: Energy intensity per net revenue
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumption per million EUR net revenue

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose total energy consumption in MWh, broken down by fossil, nuclear, and renewable sources. Include energy intensity per net revenue.

disclosures.name: Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and total GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Disclose gross Scope 1, Scope 2, and Scope 3 GHG emissions and total GHG emissions.

requiredMetrics.name: Gross Scope 3 GHG emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Gross Scope 3 GHG emissions by category

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose in metric tons of CO2eq: gross Scope 1 GHG emissions, gross Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based and market-based), gross Scope 3 GHG emissions, and total GHG emissions.

disclosures.name: GHG removals and GHG mitigation projects financed through carbon credits
disclosures.description: Disclose GHG removals from own operations and GHG mitigation achieved through carbon credits.

requiredMetrics.name: GHG removals
requiredMetrics.description: GHG removals in metric tons CO2e

requiredMetrics.name: Carbon credits purchased
requiredMetrics.description: Amount of GHG emission reductions from carbon credits

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose GHG removals and storage from own operations and the amount of GHG emission reductions or removals from climate change mitigation projects financed through carbon credits.

disclosures.name: Internal carbon pricing
disclosures.description: Disclose whether and how the undertaking applies internal carbon pricing schemes.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe whether the undertaking applies internal carbon pricing schemes, and if so, how they support decision-making and incentivise the implementation of climate-related policies.

disclosures.name: Anticipated financial effects from material physical and transition risks and potential climate-related opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material physical and transition risks and climate-related opportunities.

requiredMetrics.name: Assets at physical risk
requiredMetrics.description: Monetary amount of assets at material physical risk

requiredMetrics.name: Assets at transition risk
requiredMetrics.description: Monetary amount of assets at material transition risk

requiredMetrics.name: Revenue at risk
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of net revenue at risk from climate change

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material physical risks, material transition risks, and potential climate-related opportunities.

disclosures.name: Policies related to pollution
disclosures.description: Describe policies adopted to manage material impacts, risks and opportunities related to pollution.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe policies adopted to manage material pollution impacts, risks and opportunities, including prevention of air, water and soil pollution.

disclosures.name: Actions and resources related to pollution
disclosures.description: Describe key actions taken and planned to prevent, mitigate or remediate pollution impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose key actions and resources related to pollution prevention, mitigation and remediation.

disclosures.name: Targets related to pollution
disclosures.description: Disclose the pollution-related targets adopted.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose pollution-related targets, including reduction targets for air, water, and soil pollutants.

disclosures.name: Pollution of air, water and soil
disclosures.description: Disclose pollutant emissions to air, water and soil.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose amounts of each pollutant listed in Annex II of the E-PRTR Regulation emitted to air, water and soil.

disclosures.name: Substances of concern and substances of very high concern
disclosures.description: Disclose information on the production, use and/or distribution and commercialisation of substances of concern and substances of very high concern.

requiredMetrics.name: Substances of concern produced/used
requiredMetrics.description: Total amount of substances of concern

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose information on the total amounts of substances of concern generated or used, and substances of very high concern.

disclosures.name: Anticipated financial effects from material pollution-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of pollution-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material pollution-related risks and potential opportunities.

disclosures.name: Policies related to water and marine resources
disclosures.description: Describe policies adopted to manage water and marine resource impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe policies adopted to manage material water and marine resource impacts, risks and opportunities.

disclosures.name: Actions and resources related to water and marine resources
disclosures.description: Describe key actions and resources related to water and marine resource management.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose key actions and resources for managing water and marine resource impacts.

disclosures.name: Targets related to water and marine resources
disclosures.description: Disclose the water and marine resource-related targets adopted.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose water and marine resource-related targets, including water consumption reduction targets.

disclosures.name: Water consumption
disclosures.description: Disclose water consumption performance in terms of total water consumption, water consumption in areas at water risk, and water recycled/reused.

requiredMetrics.name: Water consumption in water-risk areas
requiredMetrics.description: Water consumption in areas at material water risk

requiredMetrics.name: Water intensity per net revenue
requiredMetrics.description: Water consumption per million EUR net revenue

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose total water consumption, water consumption in areas at water risk, and water recycled and reused.

disclosures.name: Anticipated financial effects from material water and marine resources-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of water and marine resource risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material water and marine resources-related risks and potential opportunities.

disclosures.name: Transition plan and consideration of biodiversity in strategy and business model
disclosures.description: Disclose how biodiversity and ecosystems are embedded in the undertaking's strategy.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how biodiversity and ecosystem-related considerations are integrated into the strategy and business model.

disclosures.name: Policies related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosures.description: Describe policies adopted to manage biodiversity and ecosystem impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe policies for managing material biodiversity and ecosystem impacts, risks and opportunities.

disclosures.name: Actions and resources related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosures.description: Describe key actions and resources for managing biodiversity impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose key actions and resources for managing biodiversity and ecosystem impacts.

disclosures.name: Targets related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosures.description: Disclose the biodiversity-related targets adopted.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose biodiversity-related targets including measurable outcomes, base year, target year.

disclosures.name: Impact metrics related to biodiversity and ecosystems change
disclosures.description: Disclose metrics on the undertaking's material impacts on biodiversity and ecosystems.

requiredMetrics.name: Sites in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas
requiredMetrics.description: Number of sites owned/controlled in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas

requiredMetrics.name: Area of sites in biodiversity-sensitive areas
requiredMetrics.description: Total area of sites in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose number of sites owned or controlled in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas and the area of those sites, plus land-use and land-use change metrics.

disclosures.name: Anticipated financial effects from material biodiversity and ecosystem-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of biodiversity-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material biodiversity and ecosystem-related risks and potential opportunities.

disclosures.name: Policies related to resource use and circular economy
disclosures.description: Describe policies adopted to manage resource use and circular economy impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe policies for managing material resource use and circular economy impacts, risks and opportunities.

disclosures.name: Actions and resources related to resource use and circular economy
disclosures.description: Describe key actions and resources for managing resource use and circularity.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose key actions and resources for managing resource use and circular economy impacts.

disclosures.name: Targets related to resource use and circular economy
disclosures.description: Disclose resource use and circular economy-related targets.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose resource use and circular economy-related targets.

disclosures.name: Resource inflows
disclosures.description: Disclose information on material resource inflows including overall material use and the share of biological/renewable materials and secondary materials.

requiredMetrics.name: Share of renewable materials
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of renewable materials in total material use

requiredMetrics.name: Share of secondary (recycled) materials
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of recycled materials in total material use

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose overall material use in tonnes or kilograms, the share from biological and renewable sources, and the share of secondary materials (recycled).

disclosures.name: Resource outflows
disclosures.description: Disclose information on material resource outflows, including products/materials designed for circularity and waste generated.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the total amount and breakdown of waste generated (hazardous and non-hazardous), waste diverted from disposal, and waste directed to disposal.

disclosures.name: Anticipated financial effects from material resource use and circular economy-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of resource use and circular economy risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the anticipated financial effects of material resource use and circular economy-related risks and potential opportunities.

disclosures.name: Policies related to own workforce
disclosures.description: Describe policies for managing material impacts on the undertaking's own workforce.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the policies adopted to manage material impacts on its own workforce, including human rights policies.

disclosures.name: Characteristics of the undertaking's employees
disclosures.description: Disclose the total number of employees by head count, and breakdowns by gender, country, and contract type.

requiredMetrics.name: Total employees
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of employees by head count

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the total number of employees by head count, and breakdowns by gender, country, and contract type (permanent, temporary, non-guaranteed hours), and full-time/part-time.

disclosures.name: Characteristics of non-employee workers in the undertaking's own workforce
disclosures.description: Describe non-employee workers including self-employed and workers from third-party undertakings.

requiredMetrics.name: Non-employee workers
requiredMetrics.description: Total non-employee workers in own workforce

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the total number of non-employee workers in the own workforce and a description of the types of work performed.

disclosures.name: Collective bargaining coverage and social dialogue
disclosures.description: Disclose the extent to which working conditions are determined through collective bargaining agreements and social dialogue.

requiredMetrics.name: Collective bargaining coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining agreements

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the percentage of total employees covered by collective bargaining agreements and the extent of social dialogue coverage.

disclosures.name: Diversity metrics
disclosures.description: Disclose the gender distribution at top management and the age distribution amongst the employees.

requiredMetrics.name: Female representation in top management
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of female members in top management

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the gender distribution at top management and age distribution among employees. Report the percentage of persons with disabilities among employees if reported to investors.

disclosures.name: Training and skills development metrics
disclosures.description: Disclose the extent to which training and skills development is provided to the workforce.

requiredMetrics.name: Training expenditure per employee
requiredMetrics.description: Training and development expenditure per employee

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the percentage of employees that participated in regular performance and career development reviews, and average number of training hours per employee by gender.

disclosures.name: Health and safety metrics
disclosures.description: Disclose information on the health and safety record of the undertaking's own workforce.

requiredMetrics.name: Fatalities (work-related)
requiredMetrics.description: Number of fatalities from work-related injuries and ill health

requiredMetrics.name: Days lost to work-related injuries
requiredMetrics.description: Number of days lost to work-related injuries, accidents and ill health

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the number of fatalities, number and rate of recordable work-related accidents, and number of cases of recordable work-related ill health.

disclosures.name: Work-life balance metrics
disclosures.description: Disclose the extent to which employees are entitled to and make use of family-related leave.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose percentage of employees entitled to family-related leave and the take-up of family-related leave by gender.

disclosures.name: Remuneration metrics (pay gap and total remuneration)
disclosures.description: Disclose the gender pay gap and the ratio between the highest paid individual and median employee remuneration.

requiredMetrics.name: CEO-to-employee pay ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of annual compensation of highest-paid to median employee

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the unadjusted gender pay gap and the ratio of the annual total compensation for the highest paid individual to the median annual total compensation for all employees.

disclosures.name: Incidents, complaints and severe human rights impacts
disclosures.description: Disclose the number of work-related incidents, complaints filed, and severe human rights impacts related to own workforce.

requiredMetrics.name: Complaints filed through channels
requiredMetrics.description: Number of complaints filed through internal channels

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the total number of incidents of discrimination, the total number of complaints filed, and any severe human rights impacts and incidents.

disclosures.name: Policies related to value chain workers
disclosures.description: Describe policies for managing material impacts on workers in the value chain.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the policies adopted to manage material impacts on value chain workers.

disclosures.name: Taking action on material impacts on value chain workers
disclosures.description: Describe actions taken to address material impacts on value chain workers.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe actions taken or planned to prevent, mitigate, or remediate material negative impacts on value chain workers.

disclosures.name: Policies related to affected communities
disclosures.description: Describe policies for managing material impacts on affected communities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the policies adopted to manage material impacts on affected communities.

disclosures.name: Taking action on material impacts on affected communities
disclosures.description: Describe actions taken to address material impacts on affected communities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe actions taken or planned to prevent, mitigate, or remediate material negative impacts on affected communities.

disclosures.name: Policies related to consumers and end-users
disclosures.description: Describe policies for managing material impacts on consumers and end-users.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the policies adopted to manage material impacts related to consumers and end-users.

disclosures.name: Business conduct policies and corporate culture
disclosures.description: Describe the undertaking's policies and corporate culture related to business conduct, including anti-corruption and bribery, protection of whistleblowers, and animal welfare.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how the undertaking establishes its corporate culture, including policies on business ethics, anti-corruption and anti-bribery, and protection of whistleblowers.

disclosures.name: Management of relationships with suppliers
disclosures.description: Provide information about the management of the undertaking's relationships with its suppliers and its impact on its supply chain.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how the undertaking manages its relationships with suppliers, payment practices, and integration of social and environmental criteria in supplier selection.

disclosures.name: Prevention and detection of corruption and bribery
disclosures.description: Provide information about the undertaking's system to prevent and detect corruption and bribery, and training provided.

requiredMetrics.name: Anti-corruption training coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of functions-at-risk covered by anti-corruption training

requiredMetrics.name: Confirmed corruption/bribery cases
requiredMetrics.description: Number of confirmed cases of corruption or bribery

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the scope of anti-corruption and anti-bribery training, number of convictions, and fines for corruption or bribery.

disclosures.name: Confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery
disclosures.description: Provide information about confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery and actions taken.

requiredMetrics.name: Confirmed corruption incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery

requiredMetrics.name: Fines for corruption/bribery
requiredMetrics.description: Total fines for corruption or bribery violations

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the number of convictions and fines for violations of anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws, and confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery within the undertaking.

disclosures.name: Political influence and lobbying activities
disclosures.description: Provide information about political contributions and lobbying activities.

requiredMetrics.name: Political contributions
requiredMetrics.description: Total financial and in-kind political contributions

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose representation on the financial and non-financial interests and contributions to lobbying or political activities.

disclosures.name: Payment practices
disclosures.description: Provide information about the undertaking's payment practices related to its suppliers.

requiredMetrics.name: Average payment time to suppliers
requiredMetrics.description: Average time to pay invoices from the invoice date

requiredMetrics.name: Late payments
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of payments made after agreed payment terms

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the average time the undertaking takes to pay an invoice from the date when the contractual or statutory term of payment starts to be calculated.
